name: Worth of my case: broke leg falling ladder at work, out 3 months?

mainEntity.name: Worth of my case: broke leg falling ladder at work, out 3 months?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**$50K-$150K typical** for fracture, lost wages, comp + third-party.[1]

Factors: age, job, permanency.

- Med $20K+, wages $15K.
- Pain settlement extra.
- No future work loss boosts.

Attorney calculators precise.
